summary: Full E2E testing of FacelessForge. Backend: 31/31 pytest cases passed (auth cookies, CRUD, generation pipeline script/scenes/metadata/thumbnails/render, exports txt/csv/json/zip, analytics, settings, RBAC, ownership). Frontend: landing -> login -> dashboard -> projects (3 seeded) -> project detail (all 6 tabs) -> analytics (charts render) -> settings -> logout all function end-to-end with httpOnly cookie auth.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' warnings on initial render - parent container missing a fixed/min height. Chart does render eventually but emits repeated console warnings. Consider adding minHeight or explicit height to the ResponsiveContainer parent.

action_items: Optional: Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer warning on Dashboard by giving the chart wrapper an explicit/min height to silence the width(-1)/height(-1) warnings.

Optional: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True which modern browsers reject per spec. Works here because preview routes /api same-origin, but for production add explicit origin list.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS in backend/server.py mixes allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True (spec violation). Preview is same-origin so cookies still work; replace with explicit origins for production.
routes.py L308 has dead ternary: 'source': 'llm' if True else 'fallback' - always resolves to 'llm'. Minor code smell.
routes.py is 600 lines - consider splitting auth/projects/generation/exports into separate routers once it grows further.
Seed runs as asyncio.create_task at startup - first request after cold start may see 0 projects before seed completes. UI handles the loading state gracefully.
seed_data_creation: None manually. Server seeds 3 sample projects for demo creator on startup (verified present).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, auth (register/login/logout/me + invalid creds), projects CRUD + validation, generation pipeline (script->scenes->metadata->thumbnails->render), all exports (txt/csv/json/zip), analytics overview, settings get/patch, admin RBAC, viewer RBAC, and cross-creator ownership (31 tests). Run with: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend tested via Playwright with data-testid selectors: login-*, nav-*, project-card-*, tab-*, export-*, logout-btn, field-*, etc. Generation tests use LLM; with emergentintegrations fallback they still satisfy structural assertions. Preview URL: https://video-forge-449.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. One initial false-positive in my first Playwright run where I waited only 1s for /api/projects to return - the call resolves in ~500ms-2s but the network hop through Cloudflare can spike. Using 5s wait fixed it and 3 seeded projects render correctly.
